title: HTTP Semantics, Resources, Methods, and Status Contracts · Failure Repair Bay
summary: An incident responder inherits a plausible but defective resource, method, status, and retry semantics table; retain the failing request and response, isolate the first causal server boundary, and keep a regression probe. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in resource, method, status, and retry semantics table and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence…
objectives: Separate resource identity, current server state, selected representation, transfer content, and backing storage model.
Apply safe, idempotent, and cacheable method semantics independently and preserve them through handler behavior.
Choose status, Location, validators, and response content for create, replace, partial update, asynchronous work, and deletion.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Inspect the failure record · Debug Resource Representation State
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug team handles case 8176 in a internal administrative API crossing two trust zones. Build deterministic Go evidence to connect method semantics, resource state, status, and durable effect; then make specification and runtime disagree on one nullable field and block release. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate resource identity, current server state, selected representation, transfer content, and backing storage model.
